---
title: "watcher.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/sdk/src/watcher.ts"
loc: 56
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.05
style_score: 4.06
intel_score: 4.14
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [watch](file://fs)
- [FSWatcher](file://fs)
- [resolve](file://path)
- [CacheStore](file://./cache.js)

### Exports
- `Map`
- `FileWatcher`
- `absPath`
- `watcher`
- `filePath`
- `existing`
